home.headline: Building intelligent systems and documenting the journey.
home.subtitle: A professional portfolio and publishing platform for AI research, invention case studies, technical writing, and creative work — powered by MDX and Content Collections.

home.featuredInventionsDesc: Case studies combining architecture, code, and results.

home.galleryDesc: Curated albums with responsive grids and optimized imagery.
home.papersDesc: Peer-reviewed publications with DOI links and downloadable PDFs.

about.label: Profile
about.title: About
about.metaDescription: About this portfolio and publishing platform.
about.p1: This site is a unified publishing platform for my professional work: AI research essays, invention case studies, creative writing, photo galleries, and academic papers — all authored in Markdown/MDX and rendered through Next.js.
about.p2: Content lives in the content/ directory. Each category (blog, inventions, poetry, gallery, papers) maps to its own collection schema and route. Adding a new section only requires a new folder, schema, and page template.

footer.builtWith: Built with Next.js, MDX & Content Collections
